title: Premium Car Care – Wash, Detail & Shine for All Vehicle Sizes At Super Shine Car Wash (Up to 43% Off)
highlights_html: Experience top-notch exterior wash & wax that specializes in ceramic coating for unmatched shine and protection!
highlights_text: Experience top-notch exterior wash & wax that specializes in ceramic coating for unmatched shine and protection!
about_deal_html:
Ever noticed how a good detail can make your car feel brand new? Getting your car cleaned doesn't have to be a hassle anymore. With services like ceramic coating and thorough auto detailing, you’ll enjoy driving in style while keeping your vehicle protected from the elements. Experience the satisfaction of driving away in a spotless ride that shines bright.

What We Offer

  • IN/OUT Premium Car Wash (Sedan)
  • IN/OUT Premium Car Wash (Mid-Size)
  • IN/OUT Premium Car Wash (Large Vehicle)
  • Exterior Detail (Sedan/Small SUV)
  • Deep Detail Clean (Sedan/Small SUV)
  • Ceramic Coating (Sedan Small SUV)

Why You Should Grab The Offer

Choose from a range of premium services, from in-and-out washes to deep detailing and advanced ceramic coatings, all designed for specific vehicle sizes. Whether it's a sedan, SUV, or large vehicle, every service includes meticulous hand washes, protective wax finishes, and top-tier products that ensure a spotless, lasting finish.

At Super Shine Car Wash, it’s not just about cleaning your car — it’s about preserving and enhancing it. What sets them apart is their unmatched attention to detail and specialized care tailored to your vehicle's size and needs.

Each service uses high-quality products to boost both the appearance and longevity of your car’s surface. With a team of skilled professionals committed to excellence, you're guaranteed a thorough, high-standard clean every time.

This is more than just a wash — it’s a premium car care experience, delivered by one of the most trusted names in the industry.

highlights: No booking required, present Groupon on arrival.
fine_print: Limit 3 per person(s), may buy 1 additional as gift(s).

review_quotes.text:
Super easy to schedule an appointment with them
They did a quick and immaculate job on my car 
I DID forget to tip, so I will be back to do so
review_quotes.author: heather

review_quotes.text: Great quality of work, on time, professional .
review_quotes.author: Guest

review_quotes.text: Did not touch the trunk at all, there are visible areas inside the car that they did not touch as well. Only wiped down the front windshield when I was there to pick up the car. The rest of the windows weren’t cleaned. All of my change in the dashboard was gone. They didn’t take off the steering wheel cover to clean the actual steering wheel. And the glove compartment is not cleaned at all.
review_quotes.author: Aida
